typical_classifier_prompt.comment: A representative classifier call: ~250 tokens of system + input, ~50 tokens of output (label + brief reasoning). Per-call cost below uses these values.

providers.label: OpenAI GPT-4o
providers.notes: Default baseline. The classifier-grade model most users start with.

providers.label: OpenAI GPT-4o mini
providers.notes: OpenAI's lightweight tier. ~17x cheaper than GPT-4o per classifier call.

providers.label: Anthropic Claude Haiku 3.5
providers.notes: Anthropic's fastest tier. Common production classifier choice.

providers.label: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 3.5
providers.notes: Anthropic's mid-tier. Common when classifier quality matters more than per-call cost.

providers.label: Google Gemini 1.5 Flash
providers.notes: Google's fast/cheap tier. Often the lowest cost-per-call from a hosted provider.

providers.label: Mistral Small
providers.notes: European-residency option. Useful for EU customers under GDPR.

providers.label: Together Llama 3.1 8B
providers.notes: Open-weights via Together's serverless. Cheapest hosted Llama option at this size.

providers.label: Cohere Command R
providers.notes: Cohere's mid-tier; tuned for retrieval + classification workloads.

providers.label: Ollama (local)
providers.notes: Local inference; per-call cost is notional electricity (~$0.00002/call on Apple Silicon). Zero per-token billing; latency is the trade-off.

disclaimer: Per-call cost is the typical classifier prompt cost (250 input + 50 output tokens) at the listed input/output prices. Prices change; this file is updated weekly from public provider pricing pages. Verify current rates with the provider before sizing a contract.
